operation.add: //$data['powered'] = sprintf($this->language->get('text_powered'), $this->config->get('config_name'), date('Y', time())); $data['powered'] = sprintf($this->language->get('nice_text_powered'), $this->config->get('config_name'), date('Y', time())); // Nice Theme

operation.search:
$_['text_agree'] = 'Я прочитал %s и согласен с
условиями безопасности и обработки персональных данных';
operation.add:
$_['text_agree'] = 'Я прочитал %3$s и согласен с
условиями безопасности и обработки персональных данных ';
$_['error_email'] = 'E-mail адрес введен неверно!'; $_['error_blank_email'] = 'E-mail адрес не может быть пустым!';

operation.search: $_['error_enquiry'] = 'Длина текста должна быть от 10 до 3000 символов!';
operation.add: $_['error_enquiry'] = 'Длина текста должна быть от 10 до 3000 символов!';

<script type="text/javascript">
	let form = document.querySelector('#content > form');
	form.onsubmit = function(evt) {
	evt.preventDefault();
	let quantity_old;
	let quantity_new;
	let key;

	$('#content > form').find('input').each(function() {
		quantity_new = $(this).val();
		quantity_old = $(this).attr('value');
		key = $(this).attr('name').match(/\d+/g)[0];

		var difference_in_quantity = quantity_old - quantity_new;

		if (difference_in_quantity < 0) {
	    	sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
	  	  	  id: key,
	  	  	  event: 'add',
	  	  	  id_type: 'key',
	  	  	  quantity: Math.abs(difference_in_quantity),
	  	  	  async: false
			});
			setTimeout(function() {
	    		form.submit();
			}, 1000);
		} else if (difference_in_quantity > 0) {
			sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
		  	  id: key,
		  	  event: 'remove',
		  	  id_type: 'key',
		  	  quantity: Math.abs(difference_in_quantity),
		  	  async: false
			});
			setTimeout(function() {
				form.submit();
			}, 1000);
		}
	});
};
</script>

<script type="text/javascript">
    function sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica(options) {
    	let id = options.id; // required
    	let event = options.event; // required
    	let id_type = (typeof(options.id_type) != 'undefined' ? options.id_type : 'product_id');
    	let quantity = (typeof(options.quantity) != 'undefined' ? options.quantity : 'null');
    	let async = (typeof(options.async) != 'undefined' ? options.async : true);

    	$.ajax({
            url: 'index.php?route=product/product/getProductDataForYandexMetrica',
      	    async: (typeof(async) != 'undefined' ? async : true),
      		type: 'post',
      		data: 'id=' + id + '&event=' + event + '&id_type=' + id_type + '&quantity=' + quantity,
      		dataType: 'json',
      		success: function(json) {
        	    if (event == 'add') {
          			dataLayer.push({"ecommerce": {"currencyCode": json['currency_code'], "add": {"products": [json['product']]}}});
        		} else if (event == 'remove') {
          			dataLayer.push({"ecommerce": {"currencyCode": json['currency_code'], "remove": {"products": [json['product']]}}});
        		}
      		},
      		error: function(xhr, ajaxOptions, thrownError) {
        		alert(thrownError + "\r\n" + xhr.statusText + "\r\n" + xhr.responseText);
      		}
    	});
  	}

  	cart['add_original'] = cart['add'];
  	cart['add'] = function(product_id, quantity) {
    	sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
      		id: product_id,
      		event: 'add',
      		id_type: 'product_id',
      		quantity: quantity
    	});
    	cart.add_original(product_id, quantity);
  	};

  	cart['remove_original'] = cart['remove'];
  	cart['remove'] = function(key) {
    	sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
      		id: key,
      		event: 'remove',
      		id_type: 'key',
      		async: false
    	});
    	setTimeout(function() {
      		cart.remove_original(key);
    	}, 500);
  	};
</script>

<script>
	function price_format(n){
		c = {{ currency['decimals'] is empty ? "0" : currency['decimals'] }};
		d = '{{ currency['decimal_point'] }}';
		t = '{{ currency['thousand_point'] }}';
		s_left = '{{ currency['symbol_left'] }}';
		s_right = '{{ currency['symbol_right'] }}';
		n = n * {{ currency['value'] }};
		i = parseInt(n = Math.abs(n).toFixed(c)) + '';
		j = ((j = i.length) > 3) ? j % 3 : 0;
		return s_left + (j ? i.substr(0, j) + t : '') + i.substr(j).replace(/(\d{3})(?=\d)/g, "$1" + t) + (c ? d + Math.abs(n - i).toFixed(c).slice(2) : '') + s_right;
	}
</script>
<style>.options {min-height:54px;}</style>

{% if (product['options']) %}
{% for option in product['options'] %} {% if (option['type'] == 'select') %}
{% if (option['required']) %}*{% endif %}
{% endif %} {% if (option['type'] == 'radio') %}
{% if (option['required']) %}*{% endif %}
{% for option_value in option['product_option_value'] %}
{% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% if (option['type'] == 'checkbox') %}
{% if (option['required']) %}*{% endif %}
{% for option_value in option['product_option_value'] %}
{% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% endfor %}
{% endif %}

operation.search: {% else %} {{ product.special }} {{ product.price }} {% endif %}
operation.add: {% else %} {{ product.special }} {{ product.price }} {% endif %}

<script type="text/javascript" src="index.php?route=product/live_options/js&product_id={{ product_id }}"></script>

<script type="text/javascript"><!--
    dataLayer.push({
        "ecommerce": {
            "currencyCode": "{{ currency_code }}",
            "detail": {
                "products": [
                    {
                        "id": "{{ metrica_product_id }}",
                        "name" : "{{ metrica_product_name }}",
                        "price": {{ metrica_product_price }},
                        "brand": "{{ metrica_product_manufacturer }}",
                        "category": "{{ metrica_product_category }}"
                    }
                ]
            }
        }
    });
//--></script>

operation.search: {{ error_warning }}
operation.add: {{ ' ' ~ error_warning }}

operation.search: <input type="text" name="email" value="{{ email }}" placeholder="{{ entry_email }}" id="input-email" class="form-control" />
operation.add: <input type="email" name="email" value="{{ email }}" placeholder="{{ entry_email }}" id="input-email" class="form-control" />

operation.search: {{ error_warning }}
operation.add: {{ ' ' ~ error_warning }}

<script>
		const setRedirectionToButton = (buttonId) => {
			const button = document.getElementById(buttonId);
			const buttonRedirectionLink = button.dataset.href;
			button.addEventListener('click', () =>
				window.location.href = buttonRedirectionLink
			);
		}

		setRedirectionToButton('register-button');
		setRedirectionToButton('login-button');
	</script>

  • {{ text_account }}
  • {{ text_order }}
  • {{ text_transaction }}
  • {{ text_download }}
  • {{ text_logout }}
{% else %} {% endif %}

  • {{ text_order }}
  • {{ text_transaction }}
  • {{ text_download }}

<script type="text/javascript">
	function sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica(options) {
    	let id = options.id; // required
    	let event = options.event; // required
    	let id_type = (typeof(options.id_type) != 'undefined' ? options.id_type : 'product_id');
    	let quantity = (typeof(options.quantity) != 'undefined' ? options.quantity : 'null');
    	let async = (typeof(options.async) != 'undefined' ? options.async : true);

    	$.ajax({
      		url: 'index.php?route=product/product/getProductDataForYandexMetrica',
      		async: (typeof(async) != 'undefined' ? async : true),
      		type: 'post',
      		data: 'id=' + id + '&event=' + event + '&id_type=' + id_type + '&quantity=' + quantity,
      		dataType: 'json',
      		success: function(json) {
        		if (event == 'add') {
          			dataLayer.push({"ecommerce": {"currencyCode": json['currency_code'], "add": {"products": [json['product']]}}});
       	 		} else if (event == 'remove') {
          			dataLayer.push({"ecommerce": {"currencyCode": json['currency_code'], "remove": {"products": [json['product']]}}});
        		}
      		},
      		error: function(xhr, ajaxOptions, thrownError) {
        		alert(thrownError + "\r\n" + xhr.statusText + "\r\n" + xhr.responseText);
      		}
    	});
  	}

  	cart['add_original'] = cart['add'];
  	cart['add'] = function(product_id, quantity) {
    	sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
      		id: product_id,
      		event: 'add',
      		id_type: 'product_id',
      		quantity: quantity
    	});
    	cart.add_original(product_id, quantity);
  	};

  	cart['remove_original'] = cart['remove'];
  	cart['remove'] = function(key) {
    	sendDataForEcommerceYandexMetrica({
      		id: key,
      		event: 'remove',
      		id_type: 'key',
      		async: false
    	});
    	setTimeout(function() {
      		cart.remove_original(key);
    	}, 500);
  	};
</script>

<script type="text/javascript" src="index.php?route=product/live_options/js&product_id={{ product_id }}"></script>

<script type="text/javascript"><!--
	dataLayer.push({
		"ecommerce": {
			"currencyCode": "{{ currency_code }}",
			"detail": {
				"products": [
					{
						"id": "{{ metrica_product_id }}",
						"name" : "{{ metrica_product_name }}",
						"price": {{ metrica_product_price }},
						"brand": "{{ metrica_product_manufacturer }}",
						"category": "{{ metrica_product_category }}"
					}
				]
			}
		}
	});
//--></script>

operation.add: • {{ text_homepage }}

• {{ text_support }}
operation.add: • {{ text_support }}

operation.search: <input type="text" name="model" value="{{ model }}" placeholder="{{ entry_model }}" id="input-model" class="form-control"/>
operation.add: <div class="col-sm-9"> <input type="text" name="model" value="{{ model }}" placeholder="{{ entry_model }}" id="input-model" class="form-control"/>

2. {% if dirs %} {% for dir in dirs %}
  2. {{ dir }}
    3. {% endfor %} {% endif %}

operation.search: {% if license.value == filter_license %}{{ license.text }}{% else %}{{ license.text }}{% endif %}
<input type="text" name="name" value="{{ name }}" id="input-name" class="form-control" />
operation.add: <input type="text" name="name" value="{{ name }}" placeholder="{{ entry_name }}" id="input-name" class="form-control" />

operation.search: <input type="text" name="email" value="{{ email }}" id="input-email" class="form-control" />
operation.add: <input type="email" name="email" value="{{ email }}" placeholder="{{ entry_email }}" id="input-email" class="form-control" />
<textarea name="enquiry" rows="10" id="input-enquiry" placeholder="{{ entry_enquiry }}" class="form-control">{{ enquiry }}</textarea>
